name: Tuscan White Bean Stew with Spinach and Radicchio
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups canned white beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
2. Stir in the minced garlic, chopped anchovies, and crushed red pepper. Heat for about 30 seconds.
3. Add the chopped spinach and sauté for about 30 seconds.
4. Add the chicken broth and shredded radicchio to the pan. Sauté for about 30 seconds.
5. Stir in the fresh lemon juice and canned white beans.
6. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 6 to 8 minutes.
7. Serve the stew over hot pasta and garnish with chopped oregano and parsley.
